mapper.select: /* SQL ID : SrvypprDAO.srvypprSelect 설 명 : 설문지조회 */ SELECT * FROM TB_LMS_SRVYPPR WHERE SRVYPPR_ID = #{srvypprId}
mapper.update: /* SQL ID : SrvypprDAO.srvypprRegist 설 명 : 설문지등록 */ MERGE INTO TB_LMS_SRVYPPR SRVYPPR USING ( SELECT #{srvypprId} AS SRVYPPR_ID , #{srvyId} AS SRVY_ID , #{srvyTtl} AS SRVY_TTL , #{srvyCts} AS SRVY_CTS , (SELECT NVL(MAX(SRVY_SEQNO), 0) + 1 FROM TB_LMS_SRVYPPR WHERE SRVY_ID = #{srvyId}) AS SRVY_SEQNO , #{rgtrId} AS RGTR_ID FROM DUAL ) PPR ON ( SRVYPPR.SRVYPPR_ID = PPR.SRVYPPR_ID ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET SRVYPPR.SRVY_TTL = PPR.SRVY_TTL , SRVYPPR.SRVY_CTS = PPR.SRVY_CTS , SRVYPPR.MDFR_ID = PPR.RGTR_ID , SRVYPPR.MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM() WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( SRVYPPR_ID , SRVY_ID , SRVY_TTL , SRVY_CTS , SRVY_SEQNO , RGTR_ID , REG_DTTM ) VALUES ( PPR.SRVYPPR_ID , PPR.SRVY_ID , PPR.SRVY_TTL , PPR.SRVY_CTS , PPR.SRVY_SEQNO , PPR.RGTR_ID , FN_DTTM() )
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : SrvypprDAO.srvypprPtcpCntSelect 설 명 : 설문지참여수조회 */ WITH SBJCT_USER AS ( SELECT ATNDLC.USER_ID FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC ATNDLC JOIN TB_LMS_SBJCT SBJCT ON ATNDLC.SBJCT_ID = SBJCT.SBJCT_ID WHERE ATNDLC.AUDITYN = 'N' AND SBJCT.SBJCT_ID = #{sbjctId} ) SELECT COUNT(RSPNS.SRVY_RSPNS_ID) FROM TB_LMS_SRVY SRVY JOIN TB_LMS_SRVYPPR SRVYPPR ON SRVY.SRVY_ID = SRVYPPR.SRVY_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_QSTN QSTN ON SRVYPPR.SRVYPPR_ID = QSTN.SRVYPPR_ID AND QSTN.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_PTCP PTCP ON SRVY.SRVY_ID = PTCP.SRVY_ID JOIN TB_LMS_SRVY_RSPNS RSPNS ON PTCP.SRVY_PTCP_ID = RSPNS.SRVY_PTCP_ID AND QSTN.SRVY_QSTN_ID = RSPNS.SRVY_QSTN_ID WHERE SRVY.DELYN = 'N' AND SRVY.USEYN = 'Y' AND SRVY.SRVY_ID = #{srvyId} AND SRVYPPR.SRVYPPR_ID = #{srvypprId} AND PTCP.USER_ID IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM SBJCT_USER)
mapper.update: /* SQL ID : SrvypprDAO.srvySeqnoModify 설 명 : 설문지순번수정 */ MERGE INTO TB_LMS_SRVYPPR SRVYPPR USING ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT SRVY_ID , SRVYPPR_ID , SRVY_SEQNO , #{srvySeqno} AS NEW_SRVY_SEQNO , #{searchKey} AS CURRENT_SRVY_SEQNO FROM TB_LMS_SRVYPPR WHERE SRVY_ID = #{srvyId} ) A WHERE A.SRVY_SEQNO BETWEEN LEAST(A.NEW_SRVY_SEQNO, A.CURRENT_SRVY_SEQNO) AND GREATEST(A.NEW_SRVY_SEQNO, A.CURRENT_SRVY_SEQNO) ) OLD_SRVYPPR ON ( SRVYPPR.SRVY_ID = OLD_SRVYPPR.SRVY_ID AND SRVYPPR.SRVYPPR_ID IN (OLD_SRVYPPR.SRVYPPR_ID) ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET SRVYPPR.MDFR_ID = #{mdfrId} , SRVYPPR.MOD_DTTM = FN_DTTM() , SRVYPPR.SRVY_SEQNO = CASE WHEN SRVYPPR.SRVY_SEQNO = OLD_SRVYPPR.CURRENT_SRVY_SEQNO THEN OLD_SRVYPPR.NEW_SRVY_SEQNO WHEN OLD_SRVYPPR.CURRENT_SRVY_SEQNO > OLD_SRVYPPR.NEW_SRVY_SEQNO THEN SRVYPPR.SRVY_SEQNO + 1 ELSE SRVYPPR.SRVY_SEQNO - 1 END
